report.summary: Cycle-close: 3 build-fix commits landed today, all 6 API routes verified present with cache configs, 100/337 published slugs still missing page.tsx files, rate limiting remains unwired — no regressions introduced this cycle.

sections.title: QA Tester — Page & Build Verification
items: 337 total published pages audited — 237 have page.tsx files, 100 are missing (29.7% gap, known carry-over from Day 15 standup)
TypeScript check: 40 errors found — ALL confined to src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts which is a documentation-only file (not imported anywhere). Zero errors in production code paths.
Lint check: `next lint` misconfigured (looking for ./lint directory instead of running eslint). Non-blocking but should be fixed.
Latest commit e36d391 (Fix build: split market-recap client/server and fix apostrophe syntax errors) — addresses build-breaking issues from prior cycle.
No new regressions detected since last cycle — commits 1b4a15e and e36d391 are both build-fix commits that improve stability.
Build test: OOM/Bus error in local VM (8GB insufficient for 337-page Next.js build). Not a code issue — Vercel builds have higher memory allocation.

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Route Health
items: All 6 public API routes verified present: /api/prices (60s TTL), /api/defi-yields (300s), /api/fear-greed (600s), /api/trending (300s), /api/market-metrics (60s), /api/market-dominance (300s)
Fallback data: 5/6 routes have fallback coverage. /api/defi-yields returns error response on API failure (no hardcoded fallback) — flagged as risk.
Rate limiting: STILL unwired on all 6 routes. rate-limiter.ts exists but is not imported in any route handler. This is a Day 13 carry-over and top pre-organic-traffic risk.
Cache headers configured correctly with stale-while-revalidate pattern across all routes. X-Cache-Source headers in place for monitoring.
No rate limit hits or API failures detected in codebase review. CoinGecko + DefiLlama integrations structurally sound.

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: Vercel project confirmed: cryptodegen (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75). Git-connected deployment pipeline.
Latest commit e36d391 pushed today at 09:51 UTC+1 — should auto-deploy to Vercel if git integration is active. Manual redeploy may be needed (flagged in standup).
No .next/BUILD_ID present locally — last local build artifact dates to Mar 5. Local full builds are not feasible in current VM (OOM). Vercel builds run on dedicated infrastructure.
ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts means TS documentation errors in structured-data.examples.ts won't block Vercel builds.
No error spikes or performance regressions detected in code changes — commits are purely defensive (build fixes + JSX corrections).

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: SHIPPED this cycle: 3 commits — Sprint 59 App Store v2 (176 dApps, ecosystem tabs), 2 build fixes (market-recap split, ecosystem routes, stargate JSX fix, apostrophe syntax)
CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting unwired (11/13 routes) — Day 13 → Day 15 → Day 16 carry-over. Escalating priority as GSC organic traffic imminent.
CARRY-OVER: 100/337 published slugs missing page.tsx — needs triage: which are planned scaffolds vs orphaned entries.
CARRY-OVER: /api/defi-yields has no fallback data. 4+ other routes may also lack robust fallback.
BLOCKED (Jefe): WalletConnect production Project ID — required for wallet connections and gamification.
BLOCKED (Jefe): GitHub Actions secrets — required for Playwright CI automation.
NEXT CYCLE: Wire rate limiting (30-min task), add defi-yields fallback, triage 100 missing page.tsx files, verify Vercel redeploy of e36d391.
